name: 9p21_CDKN2A_region
description: 9p21.3 region containing CDKN2A/CDKN2B/MTAP and the type-I interferon (IFN) gene cluster (~16 IFN-alpha paralogs at >85% identity). One of the most-deleted regions across solid cancers; the IFN cluster represents a true paralog family confounding short-read mapping.

architecture.internal_structure: ~16 IFNA paralogs plus IFNB1/IFNW1 in tandem array at 9p21.3 distal to CDKN2A; CDKN2A/MTAP/CDKN2B form recurrent somatic homozygous deletion target in glioblastoma, melanoma, pancreatic cancer.
